channel.title: Agentcore on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Agentcore on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥Agentic AI Email Bot on AWS Bedrock AgentCore: Full Architecture and O365 Integration (1/2)🔥
item.description:
The page is an article introducing an agentic AI email bot built on AWS Bedrock AgentCore with Microsoft O365 integration. The provided excerpt is only a brief tagline and does not include implementation details.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps

item.title: devops+ai: AgentCore: Deployment, Operations, and Lessons Learned (4/4) 🔥
item.description:
The provided content is only a short teaser and does not include substantive release or changelog details. It appears to be a post about AgentCore deployment, operations, and lessons learned, but no具体 information is available from the excerpt.
